What if every decode step gave the next one a head start?

Meet Guess-Verify-Refine — a new hardware-aware sparse-attention algorithm from NVIDIA Research. Built for TensorRT LLM on Blackwell, it reuses temporal patterns across decode steps for:

→ 1.88x faster Top-K attention https://t.co/nWHBFJkcNv

Some would say you can use accuracy alone (a histogram...) or maybe even (accuracy X number of tokens) ... but not all tokens cost the same. The Thursdays continue! Today: Codex Chrome extension

Codex could already use Chrome via Computer Use, but it took over your browser and could only work on one tab at a time.

Today unlocks speed & parallelism: Multiple agents/subagents, multiple tabs. It's magical to watch ✨
